policy.errata: Errata is stored as metadata and not appended to display names.
policy.translation: Display names are localized to Spanish using Glosario V5 Ampliado plus curated fallback terms for records absent from the glossary. Long rules text keeps text.en and text.es with glossary terminology applied; editorial prose translation can be refined separately.
